positive: A stylized celestial forest scene, featuring glowing bioluminescent mushrooms and intricate vine growth interwoven with geometric constellations. The central element is a gentle, majestic mythical creature silhouette, like a griffin or a wise owl, perched on a winding crystal branch. The color palette should be deep indigo, ethereal sapphire blue, shimmering emerald green, and accents of gold foil texture. The composition must be symmetrical and centered, designed for repeat tiling or single-panel apparel printing. High contrast, crisp linework, ethereal vaporwave aesthetic, clean silhouette focus, flat design elements incorporated into the realism.
